mnemonics: Backtrack for n-Queens: N Queens Need Queens
Backtrack for Subset-sum: Sums are Subset of Whole
Branch and Bound for Knapsack: Pack Like a Boss
keyPoints: Backtracking is useful for NP-complete problems like n-Queens and Subset-sum
Branch-and-Bound is a good approach for problems like Knapsack that have a feasible region
Approximation algorithms can provide good solutions for NP-hard problems
Limitations of algorithmic power: NP-complete problems are hard to solve exactly
Decision Trees, P, and NP are important concepts in understanding algorithmic limitations
